provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, teleportation scroll, rolled parchment of pale lavender-tinted paper tied with a shimmering silver ribbon, deep purple wax seal with a spiral portal sigil, faint sparkling dust particles cling to the surface of the paper, mysterious purple and silver color palette with hints of arcane shimmer

judgment.explanation: Purple quill on parchment paper background. Not a scroll — reads as a writing implement. Object identity wrong, but background is appropriately muted purple-grey.
